_doc: Manual roster injections for cases where MLB's rosterType=active hasn't reflected an IL activation, callup, or trade yet. Keyed by ISO date. player_id and team_id are MLB IDs. Player only appears in that date's slate AND only if their team plays that day. Once MLB API catches up, the manual entry is silently superseded.

2026-05-11.name: Mookie Betts
2026-05-11.note: Activated off IL after rehab assignment
